contentText: Lector of a Group of the PS Database Systems.
Collaboration in the research project INNALP Education Hub. Development of a programming environment for students to bring robotics, artificial intelligence (AI) and software testing into schools.
Part-time employment as a salesman and head of the sales team at the weekend of the Mühlau/Arzl-branch in Innsbruck.
Supporting people with disabilities in various areas when working in the kitchen, as well as with the transport and sale of lunch dishes.
Redesign of the school homepage of the HTL Anichstraße and development of the HTL iOS app.
Assistance in the development of hardware and software components for various test objects in the research and development department.
